member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient
member.summary: Defines a vendor-neutral PLC client.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.State
member.summary: Gets the current PLC connection state.

member.name: E:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.StateChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the PLC connection state changes.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to the PLC.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.DisconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disconnects from the PLC.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.ReadBitsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads bit values from the PLC.
member.param: The number of bits to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.ReadWordsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads word values from the PLC.
member.param: The number of words to read.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.WriteBitsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes bit values to the PLC.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Clients.IPlcClient.WriteWordsAsync(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int16},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes word values to the PLC.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState
member.summary: Defines the connection state of a PLC client.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState.Disconnected
member.summary: The client is disconnected.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState.Connecting
member.summary: The client is connecting.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState.Connected
member.summary: The client is connected.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState.Disconnecting
member.summary: The client is disconnecting.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Connections.PlcConnectionState.Faulted
member.summary: The client is in fault state.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.IPlcAddressParser
member.summary: Defines a parser that converts PLC address text into a structured PLC address.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.IPlcAddressParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses PLC address text.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.IPlcAddressParser.TryParse(System.String,Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress@)
member.summary: Attempts to parse PLC address text.
member.returns: true if the address text was parsed successfully; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress
member.summary: Represents a PLC device address.
member.param: Optional bit offset for bit-level access.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.#ctor(Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Represents a PLC device address.
member.param: Optional bit offset for bit-level access.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.DeviceType
member.summary: The PLC device memory type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.Offset
member.summary: The device offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.BitOffset
member.summary: Optional bit offset for bit-level access.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.IsBitAddress
member.summary: Returns whether this address points to a bit-level device.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcAddress.ToString
member.summary: Returns the address as a readable string.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType
member.summary: Defines common PLC device memory areas.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown or unsupported device type.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.D
member.summary: Mitsubishi or general data register area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.M
member.summary: Internal relay area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.X
member.summary: Input relay area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.Y
member.summary: Output relay area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.B
member.summary: Link relay area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.W
member.summary: Link register area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.R
member.summary: Retentive register area.

member.name: F:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Devices.PlcDeviceType.ZR
member.summary: File register area.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions
member.summary: Represents common PLC connection options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.Host
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC host address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC port.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.ConnectTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.ReadTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the read timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.WriteTimeoutMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the write timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Options.PlcConnectionOptions.StationNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the logical station number.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcReadRequest
member.summary: Represents a PLC read request.
member.param: The number of values to read.

member.summary: Represents a PLC read request.
member.param: The number of values to read.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcReadRequest.Address
member.summary: The start PLC address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcReadRequest.Count
member.summary: The number of values to read.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteBitRequest
member.summary: Represents a PLC bit write request.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteBitRequest.Address
member.summary: Gets the start PLC address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteBitRequest.Values
member.summary: Gets the bit values to write.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteWordRequest
member.summary: Represents a PLC word write request.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteWordRequest.Address
member.summary: Gets the start PLC address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Requests.PlcWriteWordRequest.Values
member.summary: Gets the word values to write.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a PLC operation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The optional PLC or adapter error code.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the optional PLC or adapter error code.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.Message
member.summary: Gets the optional result message.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful PLC result.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult.Failure(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Creates a failed PLC result.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult`1
member.summary: Represents the result of a PLC operation with a value.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the result value.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful PLC result with a value.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Abstractions.Results.PlcResult`1.Failure(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Creates a failed PLC result.
